milestones.title: First Economic Setup
milestones.description: The player collects the first sun resource and immediately plants the first Sunflower. This crucial step establishes the economy needed to fund defenses for the rest of the level.

milestones.title: First Enemy Wave Warning
milestones.description: The text 'The Zombies... are coming...' appears, signaling the end of the safe setup phase and the arrival of the first enemy unit.

milestones.title: First Defense Deployment
milestones.description: Responding to the first zombie, the player plants the first Peashooter. This acts as the first combat interaction and establishes the defensive line.

milestones.title: Huge Wave Alert
milestones.description: The warning 'A huge wave of zombies is approaching!' appears on screen. This notifies the player of a significant difficulty spike and prompts a check of current defenses.

milestones.title: Final Wave Start
milestones.description: The 'Final Wave' text appears, and a Flag Zombie leads the last large group of enemies. This marks the climax of the level.

milestones.title: Level Complete & Ability Unlock
milestones.description: After defeating the final zombie, a Cherry Bomb seed packet drops. The player collects it, unlocking a new explosive plant ability and successfully completing Level 1-2.
